hero.art_prompt: Arjun, a 23 year old Indian graduate man in smart-casual, happily surprised at a laptop showing an affordable MCA fee after comparing options, bright hopeful mood, tidy home.

panels.narration: Arjun compared MCA fees, option after option.
panels.dialogue: Why is a tech degree so costly?
panels.img_prompt: Arjun, 23, at a desk comparing several high fee figures in a notebook, concerned and focused, papers around him, tidy home.

panels.narration: Many programs ran into lakhs of rupees.
panels.dialogue: Is a real MCA only for the rich?
panels.img_prompt: Arjun looking discouraged at a laptop showing an expensive fee, chin in hand, soft disappointed expression, modest room.

panels.narration: Then he found a recognised MCA at ₹40,000 a semester.
panels.img_prompt: Arjun's eyes widening with hope at a laptop showing a clear, affordable, recognised MCA fee, warm glow of relief.

panels.narration: He enrolled on a 0% EMI he could manage.
panels.dialogue: A real MCA, no heavy debt!
panels.img_prompt: Arjun smiling confidently holding a blank enrollment confirmation at home, calm and assured, warm hopeful light. No cash or money shown.

turn.title: Why This MCA Fee Is A Steal
points: Just ₹1,60,000 for the full 2-year MCA (₹40,000/semester). A recognised tech degree at a fair, honest price.
Pay upfront and get a discount, or split it into easy 0% interest EMI.
0% interest EMI from about ₹6,667/month, so there is no heavy lump sum.
Only ₹2,500 one-time registration. Clear fees, no hidden charges.

testimonials.name: Arjun Pillai
testimonials.quote: I compared everywhere. A UGC-entitled MCA at ₹40,000 a semester was the clear, honest choice.

testimonials.name: Karan Das
testimonials.quote: The 0% EMI meant no lump sum. I pay a small amount each month and my MCA keeps going.

testimonials.name: Nisha Verma
testimonials.quote: We paid upfront and got a clear discount. A recognised tech degree at this price felt fair.

testimonials.name: Vikram Rao
testimonials.quote: I finished my MCA without a heavy loan. The monthly plan fit my budget perfectly.

facts.v: 0% interest EMI from about ₹6,667/month, or an education loan
